overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a futuristic convertible driving through Night City at dusk. The vehicle navigates neon-lit commercial districts, passes through the La Huesuda tunnel, and speeds along elevated highways with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial avenue with elevated highways

events.description: futuristic convertible crosses large intersection with yellow grid markings
vehicle accelerates while navigating between other traffic

agents.ego_description: driving a gold futuristic convertible through the commercial district, maintaining steady speed among other vehicles

notable_agents.action: oncoming car approaching in the opposite lane

entered.detail: large digital advertising screens displaying colorful neon advertisements on building facades
tall corporate building with 'MILITECH' signage visible on the facade
curved concrete overpass structure with yellow safety barriers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a futuristic convertible crossing a large intersection in a neon-lit commercial district. The Militech building dominates the left side while elevated highway ramps curve overhead. The vehicle maintains moderate speed through multi-lane roads with sparse traffic, passing under glowing digital billboards as dusk settles over the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban tunnel with artificial lighting

events.description: vehicle approaches the entrance to La Huesuda tunnel
enters tunnel causing dramatic shift from natural dusk to artificial orange lighting

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed while entering the covered tunnel section, following the road curvature

entered.detail: large concrete tunnel entrance with 'LA HUESUDA' signage displayed above the portal
smooth concrete tunnel walls with embedded lighting fixtures
rows of overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and enters the La Huesuda tunnel, transitioning from the open neon-lit streets into a covered concrete passage. Natural dusk lighting gives way to artificial orange ceiling lights as the car moves through the enclosed space, with smooth concrete walls replacing the previous glass and steel architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with elevated walkways and digital signage

events.description: exits tunnel back into natural dusk lighting with neon signs visible
vehicle navigates through intersection with crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: accelerating out of the tunnel and navigating through commercial streets with frequent billboards

notable_agents.action: car ahead maintaining distance in the same lane

entered.detail: large vertical neon sign with pink and red lighting displaying 'Dicky Twister'
pedestrian bridge or transit walkway crossing above the street level

segments.scene_description: Exiting the La Huesuda tunnel, the scene returns to open commercial streets bathed in mixed natural and neon light. The Dicky Twister neon sign glows prominently on the right, while Fourthwall billboards appear on the left. The vehicle navigates through moderate traffic, passing under elevated walkways as it continues through the dense urban commercial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with distant city skyline views

events.description: road transitions to elevated highway with view of distant skyscrapers
vehicle accelerates on open highway section with fewer obstacles

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed along the elevated highway, overtaking other vehicles while enjoying the view of the distant skyline

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan being overtaken on the right side

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers and high-rise buildings visible in the far distance against the dusk sky
overhead railway or monorail tracks running parallel to the highway
multi-level highway interchange with concrete support pillars

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to an elevated highway offering expansive views of the distant city skyline. The vehicle accelerates along the open road, passing under overhead train tracks and multi-level interchanges. The Dicky Twister and Fourthwall signs fade behind as the car cruises toward the towering skyscrapers visible on the horizon, with the sky transitioning deeper into evening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a futuristic convertible as it moves from the open, neon-drenched streets of a commercial district into the enclosed confines of an urban tunnel. It begins by crossing a large intersection beneath glowing digital billboards, with the Militech building looming to the left and elevated highway ramps curving overhead. As the vehicle maintains its speed through the multi-lane roads, the expansive dusk sky and glass architecture gradually recede. The scene then shifts as the car enters the La Huesuda tunnel, where the natural twilight and vibrant neon lights are replaced by the artificial orange glow of ceiling lamps. Finally, the open city landscape vanishes entirely, leaving only the smooth concrete walls of the passage to frame the vehicle's forward motion.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed atmosphere of a tunnel into the expansive, neon-lit sprawl of a futuristic city at dusk. It begins as the vehicle exits the La Huesuda tunnel, emerging into open commercial streets where the glow of Dicky Twister and Fourthwall signs illuminates the dense urban traffic and elevated walkways. As the car navigates through this commercial zone, the scene shifts toward an elevated highway, leaving the bright billboards behind. The camera then accelerates along the open road, passing under overhead train tracks and multi-level interchanges while the sky deepens into evening. Finally, the view expands to reveal a vast horizon of towering skyscrapers as the vehicle cruises toward the distant city skyline.
